error_signature: No path back to referenced node
title: Node connection error in workflow
symptom: The workflow throws an error stating 'No path back to referenced node' when trying to execute a tool that references another node.
applies_when: Using multiple nodes in a workflow
Referencing a node in an expression
not_this_if: The workflow has no nodes referencing each other
root_cause: This error occurs when a node in the workflow is referenced in an expression but does not have a direct connection back to the node that is being executed. This can happen if nodes are not properly wired together, leading to a broken execution path.
fix_steps: Edit the workflow to ensure all nodes are properly connected
Make sure the node 'Get Availability' has a connection back to the node that references it
Save the workflow and try executing it again
agent_instruction: Ensure all nodes in the workflow are properly connected to avoid reference errors.
